highlights.title: Global Market: Japanese bond yields mixed as BOJ rate-hike expectations and inflation concerns shape sentiment

OECD warns of global slowdown as U.S.-Iran war stymies economic growth prospects
KKR, Ares, Blackstone tumble as Partners Group caps private equity fund withdrawals
Dulux owner Akzo Nobel closes 17% lower after takeover talks collapse; European stocks fall
Indian consumers turn defensive as job fears rise, economic confidence falls
